stories.title: Monaco GP Preview — The Crown Jewel Returns June 5-7
stories.angle: Monaco is the greatest stage in racing. The championship battle, strategy freedom, and Leclerc's home defense make this unmissable.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
MONACO. TWO WEEKS AWAY.

June 5-7 | Circuit de Monaco | Louis Vuitton GP

Antonelli leads by 43 pts. Leclerc defends on his home streets.
Two-stop rule scrapped. Free strategy is BACK.

#F1Fanrecap #MonacoGP #F1

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
New for 2026 Monaco:

Louis Vuitton title sponsor (replaces TAG Heuer).
Audi and Cadillac in the mix as new teams.
No mandatory two-stop rule.

The crown jewel of F1 just got more interesting.

#F1Fanrecap #MonacoGP #F1

article.headline: Monaco GP 2026 Preview: Championship Stakes, Free Strategy, and Leclerc's Home Defense

stories.title: Antonelli's Race Start Problem — Could Cost Him at Monaco
stories.angle: The one weakness that could derail Antonelli's perfect season.

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
Jolyon Palmer warning: Antonelli's poor race starts are a REAL problem at Monaco.

At Miami, he started from pole and lost the lead at Turn 1 to Leclerc.

Monaco's run to Turn 1 is even shorter. If he can't fix this — Monaco could slip away.

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #MonacoGP

article.headline: Antonelli's Race Start Problem: Why Monaco Could Be His First Real Test of 2026

stories.title: Russell's Monaco Lifeline — "Desperately Needs a Pick-Me-Up"
stories.angle: Russell's season hinges on Monaco. If he doesn't win here, the title race is effectively over.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
George Russell trails Antonelli by 43 points.

He was LEADING in Canada when his engine failed on Lap 30.
Now he needs Monaco. Badly.

Without a win here, the 2026 title race may already be over.

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #MonacoGP

stories.title: Verstappen's Monaco Redemption Shot — Two-Time Winner, Struggling 2026
stories.angle: Monaco is where Verstappen becomes dangerous again — and nobody should forget it.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Verstappen is 9th in the championship.
He's also a 2-time Monaco winner (2021, 2023).

The RBPT-Ford engine is one of the best in F1 2026.
The streets of Monte Carlo could change everything.

Don't count Max out. #F1Fanrecap #F1 #MonacoGP

stories.title: The Two-Stop Rule Is Dead — Monaco Strategy Is Free Again
stories.angle: The worst rule Monaco has ever seen is gone. The chess match is back.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
The mandatory Monaco two-stop rule is gone for 2026.

In 2025, teams gamed it — cars lapped 4 seconds slower.
Fans hated it. The FIA scrapped it.

This year: free strategy. Real chess. Real racing.

#F1Fanrecap #MonacoGP #F1
